evidence: If we have a procedure consisting of sequential tasks $T_1, T_2, \dots, T_k$ that can be done in $m_1, m_2, \dots, m_k$ ways, respectively, then there are $m_1 * m_2 * \dots * m_k$ ways to carry out the procedure
